name: BigCommerce
description: BigCommerce is a hosted e-commerce platform for building and operating online stores.

auth_methods.note: Official docs describe two primary ways to authenticate: (1) OAuth 2.0 for apps (https://developer.bigcommerce.com/docs/start/authentication/oauth2) and (2) Store API Accounts (API Accounts) created in a store control panel, which generate a Client ID and Access Token used as headers X-Auth-Client and X-Auth-Token. Mapped here to oauth2 and to api_key/token respectively.

credential_access.note: Getting Started guide lists prerequisites including a BigCommerce store and explicitly notes you can use a trial store for development/testing; it also describes creating an app in the Developer Portal to obtain Client ID/Client Secret and installing it to receive an OAuth access token.

api_surface.note: Official API Reference documents both the Store Management REST APIs (manage products, customers, orders, etc.) and the Storefront GraphQL API; the coverage includes core store objects indicating broad coverage.

buildability.note: Public API reference is available (https://developer.bigcommerce.com/api-reference). Official authentication docs show self-serve credential paths: OAuth 2.0 for apps (https://developer.bigcommerce.com/docs/start/authentication/oauth2) and Store API Accounts created in a store control panel that generate Client ID and Access Token for X-Auth-Client/X-Auth-Token headers (https://developer.bigcommerce.com/docs/start/authentication/api-accounts). Getting started guide indicates you can use a trial store for development/testing (https://developer.bigcommerce.com/apps/guide/getting-started).

queries: How to create Store API Account BigCommerce control panel
